title: Spontex Brilliant Scourer Non-Scratch - Pack Of 2
features: Top-Quality Material: Constructed with durable and lightweight foam, ensuring long-lasting performance
Versatile Scourer: Perfect for cleaning various surfaces, including ceramic, glass, stainless steel, melamine, wood, and plastic
Abrasive yet Gentle: Features an abrasive surface that effectively removes tough stains without scratching delicate surfaces
Pack of 2: Includes two sponges, providing excellent value and ensuring you always have a clean scourer on hand
description: Introducing the Spontex Brilliant Scourer Non-Scratch, a 2-pack utility sponge designed to provide efficient cleaning for various surfaces. The sponge is lightweight and features an abrasive foam material, perfect for tackling tough stains on ceramic, glass, stainless steel, melamine, wood, and plastic surfaces. Each pack contains 2 items, with each sponge having accurate dimensions to fit comfortably in your hand. The sponge is easy to care for and can be used again and again, making it an excellent choice for your kitchen or dining needs. With its special feature of being non-scratch, you can trust this product to clean effectively without causing any damage. Get your Spontex Brilliant Scourer Non-Scratch today and experience the brilliance of a sparkling clean home.
